title: Speed, Struggle, and Quitting
subtitle: PISA 2018 · 71 Computer-Based Countries · 551,792 Students
description: Countries scoring almost identically on PISA can produce wildly different test-takers: Korea answers 81% of its correct items fast, Sweden just 40% — and the Netherlands and Sweden score 0.1 points apart yet differ 4x in how often students give up.
